description: Machine-readable registry of community skill packs installable via ./install-skill-pack. Mirrors the human-readable table in README.md.

packs.name: AntFleet aeon-skills
packs.description: On-demand two-model-consensus PR review (Claude Opus + GPT) with on-chain USDC payment channel on Base. Pull-mode counterpart to AntFleet's auto-review GitHub App.
packs.author: AntFleet

packs.name: aeon-skill-pack-vvvkernel
packs.description: Venice AI inference via VVVKernel — onchain, audit, growth, narrative, image gen, monitoring.
packs.author: baseddevoloper

packs.name: luca-aeon-skills
packs.description: Financial intelligence via x402Books AI — wallet scanning, treasury monitoring, financial reports, agent registry on Base.
packs.author: danbuildss

packs.name: zer0-skill-pack
packs.description: Polymarket intelligence — daily theses, mispricing scans, contrarian fades, narrative-vs-markets gaps, paper-trade PnL journal, alpha comment curation.
packs.author: ZER0 LABS

packs.name: GitBounty Skill Pack
packs.description: Bounty hunting on the gitlawb network — discovers open bounties via the gitbounty firehose, scouts the best fit, drafts a PR plan with a confidence score.
packs.author: gitlawbounty
